video_title: In Your Dreams | Official Teaser | Netflix
comment_text: Let's be absolutely real with how weird, strange, and complex dreams are. It can be hard when trailers for movies, shows, or such released way early that you have to wait a long time for the actual thing to release, but I'm sure this is worth it, and I can see potential like how many different animation styles and archetypes can be used to portray dreams in all sorts of aspects. Stevie in her anime style vibes off like she'll be acting like Nobara Kugisaki, Sailor Moon, Nobara Kugisaki, Chain Sumeragi, or someone so I bet this would be awesome! The way character developed may be expressed would be interesting for how dreams be a reflection of the deeper details about a person's identity so because Elliot feels like a messy outcast adventurous fun kid sort of person, then you could say that Baloney Tony existing would be for a purpose of Elliot having a friend he can relate to.
